alignments.candidate_evidence: 8 years scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; designs and directs LLM coding agents; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking, and calibration for AI/agentic tooling
alignments.job_requirement: Design, scope, and build full-stack systems delivering customer value; codify patterns into tools and playbooks

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led transformation programs and commercial operations scaling at Google; cross-functional stakeholder management; execution and rollout leadership documented in profile
alignments.job_requirement: Embed with customer teams, understand needs, guide adoption; keep teams moving through clarity and follow-through

alignments.candidate_evidence: Advanced SQL (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions, BigQuery); Python basic and actively learning (pandas); manages Salesforce administration
alignments.job_requirement: Write and review production-grade code; contribute directly in code when progress depends on it

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs, specs, and directs LLM coding agents; owns evaluation methodology and benchmarking; actively involved in AI/agentic tooling but from design/product-ownership angle rather than native FDE deployment
alignments.job_requirement: Build or deploy systems powered by LLMs/generative models; understand how model behaviour affects product experience

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions at Google Devices and Services; scaling global operations; transformation program leadership in ambiguous environments
alignments.job_requirement: Scope and deliver complex systems in fast-moving, ambiguous environments

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations leadership; documented experience in transformation and execution; cross-functional influence at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Spot risks early, adjust without slowing down; simplify complexity; make sound decisions under pressure

gaps.gap: No production software-engineering background or native Forward Deployed Engineer / technical deployment experience; experience is operations, strategy, and AI tooling design rather than end-to-end customer system delivery
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has 8 years at a tier-1 tech company with proven ability to learn complex domains and partner with engineers; LLM/agentic-tooling ownership and AI benchmarking provide foundation in model behavior and evaluation. Could learn FDE patterns through immersion, but ramp would be steep.

gaps.gap: Python at basic level and actively learning; role requires production-grade Python coding and code review across frontend and backend
gaps.mitigation: Candidate demonstrates data-analysis and querying skill in SQL/BigQuery; can ramp Python through structured learning and pair programming. Still a material time-to-productivity gap.

gaps.gap: No documented full-stack system design or frontend/backend build experience; expertise is in operational tooling, dashboards (Looker, Tableau), and CRM administration
gaps.mitigation: LLM agent design and benchmarking work shows systems thinking; could develop full-stack skills through mentorship and collaborative delivery, but gap is substantial.

gaps.gap: Limited direct consulting brand or external deployment-team experience; internal Google operations scaling differs from external customer-facing technical delivery at pace
gaps.mitigation: Strong internal execution, stakeholder management, and cross-functional influence provide transferable leadership foundation. Customer-facing communication skills inferred from partnership work but not deeply evidenced.

gaps.gap: No documented experience in JavaScript or equivalent frontend framework; role mentions frontend and backend code authoring
gaps.mitigation: Advanced Excel/Sheets and Looker dashboard building provide some UI/UX sensibility; JavaScript could be learned, but represents an additional ramp need.

output.level_rationale: 5+ years required engineering/deployment experience with customer-facing work, full-stack system design and production rollout, code authoring in Python/JavaScript, and LLM system deployment. Reporting line not stated. Hybrid London-based role with 50% travel. At a frontier-AI company scale, this positions the role at mid-to-senior IC (L5). lack of management scope and explicit 5-year anchor keep it below L6.
output.summary: This Forward Deployed Engineer role at OpenAI is a technical delivery and customer-facing systems-engineering position requiring 5+ years of engineering, LLM/generative model deployment experience, and production-grade coding in Python/JavaScript. The candidate brings 8 years of strategy, operations, and transformation leadership at Google with advanced SQL/BigQuery, AI/agentic tooling design, and Salesforce administration—strong operational and strategic execution capabilities—but lacks production software-engineering background, native FDE/technical deployment experience, and hands-on production coding at the required depth. This is a high-capability ops-and-strategy candidate in a role that explicitly gates on engineering and coding fundamentals.
uncertainties: Depth of LLM deployment experience: candidate's AI/agentic tooling role is described as design-and-direction focused; unclear how much hands-on model integration or production LLM troubleshooting the candidate has personally executed

Customer-facing technical delivery cadence: internal Google operations scaling may differ meaningfully from external FDE deployment rhythm and customer pressure; no evidence of external consulting or customer-vendor relationship management
Frontend engineering exposure: Looker/Tableau dashboarding is BI/analytics tooling, not full-stack frontend; JavaScript or modern frontend framework experience not mentioned

Speed and risk tolerance in ambiguous delivery: Google Devices/Services scale and process maturity differ from OpenAI startup/frontier-model deployment chaos; unproven in high-tempo, unstructured customer delivery
